intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in your Kew Gardens home? Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, effective flea treatment services throughout this historic Queens neighborhood. Our experienced technicians use proven methods to eliminate fleas from carpets, upholstery, and pet areas, ensuring your family and pets can live comfortably again.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Kew Gardens residents for years with reliable, affordable flea extermination services. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of flea control in Queens apartments and homes, offering customized treatment plans with a satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: From the elegant Tudor and Colonial homes near Forest Park to the garden apartments along Lefferts Boulevard, Kew Gardens properties require specialized flea treatment approaches. Our team is familiar with the area's mix of single-family residences and multi-unit buildings near the Kew Gardens LIRR station, ensuring effective flea elimination no matter your property type.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Kew Gardens?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in Kew Gardens typically ranges from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your home, severity of the infestation, and number of rooms requiring treatment. We provide free estimates and customize our pricing based on your specific situation.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: Most flea treatments show significant results within 24-48 hours, with complete elimination typically achieved within 2-3 weeks. This timeline accounts for treating adult fleas, eggs, and larvae. We often recommend a follow-up treatment after 14 days to ensure all life stages are eliminated.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, our flea treatments are safe when applied by our trained professionals. We use EPA-approved products and provide clear instructions on when it's safe to re-enter treated areas, typically after 2-4 hours. We recommend keeping pets and children away during application and drying time.

faqs.question: Do I need to prepare my Kew Gardens home before flea treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, preparation helps maximize treatment effectiveness. We recommend vacuuming thoroughly, washing pet bedding, removing pets during treatment, and clearing floor spaces. Our technicians will provide a detailed preparation checklist when scheduling your appointment to ensure the best results for your Kew Gardens home.
